sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41869" key="e)pourai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπουραῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (οὐρά)</foreign> <sense id="n41869.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">on the tail,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δῆγμα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.252.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
